basics.name: Marcos Portales Ramos
basics.label: Full-Stack Developer
basics.summary: Full-Stack Developer based in Córdoba with proven experience building scalable, well-typed JavaScript/TypeScript applications (React, Next.js, Vue, Angular) and backend systems (Node.js, Spring Boot) with PostgreSQL. I deliver Dockerized services, CI/CD pipelines, and secure, performant APIs; I also integrate AI automations and data modeling to reduce manual work and optimize key modules. I partner closely with product, design, and QA to ship pragmatic solutions used by thousands that improve performance and reduce user-reported errors.

work.name: Centro de Atención Sociosanitaria, S.A. Moriles
work.summary: Technical support and preventive/corrective maintenance of equipment and software to ensure operational continuity.
highlights: Resolution of basic user issues, equipment configuration, and support with systems administration tasks.
Tracking recurring issues and documenting incidents to facilitate resolution.

work.name: Equilateral Cloud S.L
work.summary: One-month temporary project focused on developing modern web applications with AI model integration to automate internal workflows and improve user experience.
highlights: Implementation of full-stack architectures with Next.js, including hybrid rendering (SSR/ISR) and performance optimizations in key modules.
Data modeling and management with Drizzle ORM and PostgreSQL, ensuring strict typing and stable migrations.
Creation of scalable and secure APIs for internal and external consumption.
Participation in requirements definition, technical design, and improvement proposals focused on efficiency and scalability.
Reduced manual work through AI automations and improved performance in key modules.

work.name: ANF Autoridad de Certificación
work.summary: Responsible for the maintenance and evolution of electronic signature and document management systems critical to the organization's daily operations.
highlights: Development of new features in internal modules used by thousands of users nationwide, prioritizing security and performance.
Refactoring of legacy Vue components to improve maintainability and reduce technical debt.
Collaboration with backend, QA, and design teams in agile environments to deliver continuous improvements.
Reduced user-reported errors and optimized load times in key modules.

work.name: EFE Valparaíso
work.summary: Developed a metro network event simulator with interactive visualizations using D3.js.
highlights: Implemented dynamic interfaces and dashboards to interpret complex data in real time.
Designed reusable components and integrated external APIs.
Participated in UI/UX improvements, workflow optimization, and continuous integration.

work.name: Division of Computerization and Communications, Universidad Central "Marta Abreu" de Las Villas (UCLV)
work.summary: Developed internal management systems for the university using Java and Spring Boot.
highlights: Implemented views and interactive components with Vaadin.
Designed and optimized data models in PostgreSQL.
Worked in CI/CD environments with GitLab.
Led front-end architecture improvements and proposed refactors that reduced recurring bugs.

Provincial Programming Contest Copa Abel Santamaría

awards.summary: Recognition as a young talent in competitive programming.

projects.name: LC3 Eco-Cement Plant IIoT Platform
projects.description: IIoT supervision for an eco-cement plant: PLC-captured process variables streamed to ThingsBoard, REST and WebSocket APIs, PostgreSQL persistence, and a React web app for monitoring and control.
highlights: National CITMA thesis project · UCLV
PLC, ThingsBoard, and PostgreSQL integration

projects.name: SaaS billing platform
projects.description: Multi-tenant SaaS billing platform: FastAPI REST API for customers, products, invoices, payments, webhooks, and PDF generation, plus an Angular admin panel with RBAC.
highlights: JWT auth, invoices, payments, webhooks, and PDF
Angular admin panel with RBAC and E2E tests

projects.name: n8n Clone
projects.description: Visual workflow automation MVP: drag-and-drop editor, node parameters, manual runs, webhooks, and execution history with Next.js and React Flow.
highlights: Visual flow editor
Prisma and workflow execution

projects.name: Slack Clone
projects.description: Real-time team messaging with channels, workspaces, and a Next.js front end backed by Convex.
highlights: Real-time messaging
Workspaces and channels

projects.name: J.A.R.V.I.S
projects.description: Modular voice assistant with Gemini Live native audio, plug-in tools, and Socket.IO — Python API, React UI, and Electron desktop shell.
highlights: Python API and tool orchestration
Electron and modular architecture
